title: • If an artifact returns, another must be destroyed.
content:
• If an artifact returns, another must be destroyed.

✔ Exchange of Power Mechanic:
• Players may resurrect by paying in XP, a faction-wide debuff, or another character’s sacrifice.
• Example: The Fallen Angel archetype can revive an artifact, but only by cursing another student.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents overuse of resurrection mechanics.
✔ Forces players to weigh major strategic decisions.
✔ Keeps the game world dynamically evolving.

📜 4. Faction & Player Combat System – Pitting Students Against One Another

📜 Every week, students will engage in faction-based or individual combat challenges.

✔ Player vs. Player Combat Scenarios:
• Debate Battles – Students engage in structured, skill-based rhetoric combat.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 451 (chunk 451/555)
